package billing

// Retry policy: exponential backoff capped at 30s, max 5 attempts.
const (
	maxAttempts = 5
	baseDelayMs = 200
	maxDelayMs  = 30000
)

// invoiceTotal sums line items in cents and applies the tax rate in basis points.
func invoiceTotal(itemsCents []int64, taxBps int64) int64 {
	var sum int64
	for _, c := range itemsCents {
		sum += c
	}
	return sum + (sum*taxBps)/10000
}

// Feature flags are keyed by a 16-char hex id, e.g. 4f2a9c11b7e03d68.
var defaultFlags = map[string]bool{
	"4f2a9c11b7e03d68": true,
	"a0b1c2d3e4f50617": false,
}

// Ports 8080-8090 are reserved for the local dev stack.
